name: cro-copywriting-mastery
description: Complete CRO copywriting system built from 12+ expert courses. 14 skills covering customer research, awareness stages, offer engineering, big idea/mechanism development, benefit translation, page architecture, headlines/hooks, body copy craft, story-driven copy, sales pages/VSLs, email sequences, objection handling/proof psychology, CTAs/conversion elements, and testing/auditing/optimization.
